patch.old_text:
print("[AutoPlayController] _ready, enable=", enable)

	if not GuidanceController.Instance or not GuidanceController.Instance.box_holder:
		push_warning("[AutoPlayController] GuidanceController 或 box_holder 未设置")
		return
patch.new_text:
print("[AutoPlayController] _ready, enable=", enable)
	print("[AutoPlayController] GuidanceCtrl=", GuidanceController.Instance)
	print("[AutoPlayController] box_holder=", GuidanceController.Instance.box_holder if GuidanceController.Instance else "null")

	if not GuidanceController.Instance or not GuidanceController.Instance.box_holder:
		push_warning("[AutoPlayController] GuidanceController 或 box_holder 未设置，延迟重试")
		# GuidanceController 还没初始化，延迟一帧重试
		await get_tree().process_frame
		await get_tree().process_frame
		print("[AutoPlayController] 重试 GuidanceCtrl=", GuidanceController.Instance)
		if not GuidanceController.Instance or not GuidanceController.Instance.box_holder:
			push_warning("[AutoPlayController] 重试仍失败")
			return
